tasks.subject: Task 1: Talent data model + sheet registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register a `talent` item type with a data model.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-data-model.mjs`
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-sheet.mjs`
- Create: `templates/talent-sheet.hbs`
- Modify: `scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs`

**Verify:** Item.create({type:"talent"}) succeeds, sheet renders.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-data-model.mjs", "scripts/talent/talent-sheet.mjs", "templates/talent-sheet.hbs", "scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: Item.create({name:'X',type:'talent'},{temporary:true}) in Foundry console", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CONFIG.Item.dataModels.talent exists", "Talent item creation works", "Talent sheet renders", "Other item types unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create vce-talents pack and register it
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Empty LevelDB pack registered in module.json.

**Files:**
- Create: `packs/vce-talents/`
- Modify: `module.json`

**Verify:** game.packs.get('vagabond-character-enhancer.vce-talents') returns CompendiumCollection, count=0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packs/vce-talents/", "module.json"], "verifyCommand": "manual: game.packs.get('vagabond-character-enhancer.vce-talents')", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pack registered in module.json", "Pack appears in compendium browser", "Pack count = 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Author 14 Talent items in vce-talents
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All 14 Talents per spec table, with full data model fields populated.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packs/vce-talents/*` (LevelDB write-through)

**Verify:** Pack contains 14 talent-type items; buff Talents have non-null focusBuffAE; spell-aliased Talents have aliasOf set.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packs/vce-talents/"], "verifyCommand": "manual: const docs = await game.packs.get('vagabond-character-enhancer.vce-talents').getDocuments(); console.log(docs.length)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["14 talent items total", "4 buff Talents have focusBuffAE", "10 aliased Talents have aliasOf set"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Inject Talents tab on Psychic character sheets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Talents tab visible on Psychic actors only, rendering known Talents as cards (Cast/Focus stubs).

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs`
- Create: `templates/talents-tab.hbs`
- Modify: `scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs`
- Modify: `styles/vagabond-character-enhancer.css`

**Verify:** Open Psychic sheet → Talents tab present. Open Wizard sheet → no Talents tab.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs", "templates/talents-tab.hbs", "styles/vagabond-character-enhancer.css", "scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: open Psychic actor sheet, verify Talents tab visible", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tab visible on Psychic actors only", "Cards render with name/icon/description", "Cast/Focus stub buttons render", "Buff Talents show Buff badge", "Header shows Mana Cap and Focus counter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Build Talent pick dialog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DialogV2 picker for selecting Talents. Standalone — fired manually.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-pick-dialog.mjs`
- Create: `templates/talent-pick-dialog.hbs`

**Verify:** TalentPickDialog.show(actor, 3) returns array of picked talents on confirm, null on cancel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-pick-dialog.mjs", "templates/talent-pick-dialog.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: await game.vagabondCharacterEnhancer.talentPicker.show(actor, 3)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dialog shows all Talents not already known", "Live counter updates on check/uncheck", "Cap enforcement at exact count", "Confirm returns picked array", "Cancel returns null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Auto-fire pick dialog on class detection / level-up
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Picker fires automatically when a Psychic actor needs to pick (class detect → 3 picks; L3/5/7/9 level-ups → 1 pick each).

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/feature-detector.mjs`

**Verify:** Drop Psychic class on fresh actor → picker fires for 3. Level to 3 → picker fires for 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/feature-detector.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: create actor, add Psychic class, verify picker fires", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Picker fires on Psychic class create (3 picks)", "Picker fires on level to 3/5/7/9 (1 pick)", "flags.psychicTalentsPicked tracks completed tiers", "Cancel does not mark tier complete", "Picked Talents added to actor as items"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Build Talent cast dialog (full RAW)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cast dialog with damage slider + delivery dropdown + effect toggle + duration radio, bounded by Mana cap.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-cast.mjs`
- Create: `templates/talent-cast-dialog.hbs`

**Verify:** TalentCast.openDialog(actor, talent) returns config object on cast, null on cancel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-cast.mjs", "templates/talent-cast-dialog.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: await game.vagabondCharacterEnhancer.talentCast.openDialog(actor, talent)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Damage slider 0 to cap", "Delivery dropdown filtered to allowed and affordable", "Effect toggle gated by remaining cap", "Live spent/cap counter", "Returns config object on cast", "Returns null on cancel"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Resolve cast → roll damage → render chat card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirmed cast actually rolls damage and renders chat card with working save buttons.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/talent/talent-cast.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs`

**Verify:** Cast Pyrokinesis at L1 Touch → 1d6 damage card → save button works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-cast.mjs", "scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: cast Pyrokinesis from Talents tab, verify chat card and save", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Damage rolls correctly with cap-bounded scaling", "Chat card renders", "Save button routes through VCE save handling", "Effect-only Talents work without damage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Verify die-bonus AE field shape
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock open decision #3 — confirm bonusDie field exists or document alternative.

**Files:** None (research-only, may update spec).

**Verify:** Open spec doc updated with confirmed field shape.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual: grep system data + test AE in Foundry", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bonusDie field shape confirmed or alternative documented", "Spec Open Decisions updated", "Buff Talent definitions in T3 use confirmed shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Multi-focus capacity (Duality)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set flags.psychicTalents.maxFocus based on Psychic class level. Updates on level-up.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs`

**Verify:** Level Psychic 1 → 4 → 8, inspect flag.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs", "scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: actor.getFlag('vagabond-character-enhancer', 'psychicTalents')", "acceptanceCriteria": ["L1-3 maxFocus=1", "L4-7 maxFocus=2", "L8+ maxFocus=3", "Auto-updates on level change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Focus toggle + buff AE manager
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Click Focus on a Talent toggles in focusedIds and applies/removes focusBuffAE for buff Talents. Capacity enforced.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-buffs.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs`

**Verify:** Focus Shield → AE applied. Unfocus → removed. Try focus 2nd at L1-3 → rejected.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-buffs.mjs", "scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: focus Shield via UI, check actor.effects + flag", "acceptanceCriteria": ["focusedIds tracks talent ids", "focusBuffAE applied with origin and flag", "AE removed on unfocus", "Capacity rejected over maxFocus", "Tab re-renders with focus state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Mental Fortress (L6) status immunities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Passive AE granting immunity to Berserk/Charmed/Confused/Frightened at L6+.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs`

**Verify:** L6+ Psychic actor has the AE applied; statusImmunities updated.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs", "scripts/feature-detector.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: level Psychic to 6, check actor.effects and system.statusImmunities", "acceptanceCriteria": ["L6+ has Mental Fortress AE", "statusImmunities contains all 4 conditions", "AE removed if level drops below 6"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Awakening — psychicMindTrinket flag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set psychicMindTrinket flag on Psychic class detection. Telepath grant remains player-driven.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs`

**Verify:** Drop Psychic on actor → flag = true.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: actor.getFlag('vagabond-character-enhancer', 'psychicMindTrinket')", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Flag set true on Psychic class create", "Flag persists across reloads"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Precognition (L2) — first-save Favor while Focusing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** L2+ Psychic with focused Talent gets Favor on first save each combat round.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs`

**Verify:** L2 Psychic with Shield focused → first save Favor, second none. Round changes → resets.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/class-features/psychic.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: trigger save in combat, check d6 added", "acceptanceCriteria": ["L2+ with focused talent first save gets Favor", "Subsequent saves same round no auto-Favor", "Round transition resets per-round flag", "No Favor if no Talent focused"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Transcendence (L10) — Talent swap dialog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** L10 button opens swap dialog (remove + add). Honor-system action cost.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/talent/talent-transcendence.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs`

**Verify:** L10 Psychic clicks Transcendence → swap → known Talents updated.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/talent/talent-transcendence.mjs", "scripts/talent/talents-tab.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: L10 Psychic, click Transcendence, swap, verify items", "acceptanceCriteria": ["L10+ shows Transcendence button", "Pre-L10 hides button", "Swap dialog has Remove and Add dropdowns", "Confirm deletes/creates correctly", "Toast notification on confirm"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Update CLAUDE.md and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the Psychic / Talents system.

**Files:**
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Verify:** Both docs reflect the new system.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual: read both docs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLAUDE.md has Psychic/Talents architecture section", "CHANGELOG Unreleased section captures user-facing additions"]}
```
